mail-domains.title: Mail Domains
mail-domains.description: List of domains that this relay server will consider internal

mail-server-host.description: The mail server host (IPv6) for this domain
mail-server-host.title: Mail Server Host

mail-server-port.description: The mail server port for this domain
mail-server-port.title: Mail Server Port

can-send.description: Whether this domain can send (outbound) emails through the relay

authentication.description: Authentication method: 'none' for IP-based, 'password' for SASL

fingerprints.title: Backend TLS certificate(s) fingerprint(s)
fingerprints.description:: List of fingerprints of the backend's certificates to authentify the backend to the relay
